name: Security Oversight and Implementation
desc: Outlines the responsibilities of senior leadership, security officers, and IT personnel in managing security.

name: Security Implementation Framework
desc: Defines the technical and procedural security controls to mitigate risks and ensure compliance.

name: Ongoing Security Awareness Initiatives
desc: Implements programs to enhance employee awareness of cyber threats and security policies.

name: Security Monitoring and Auditing
desc: Implements continuous monitoring solutions and periodic security audits for compliance validation.

name: Review Participants and Their Responsibilities
desc: Outlines key personnel involved in ISMS reviews and their respective roles.

name: Scheduled and Extraordinary Reviews

name: Review Findings

name: Key Performance Indicators
desc: Lists and tracks key metrics that show ISMS effectiveness.

name: Audit and Compliance
desc: Summarizes the audit results and confirms compliance with regulatory requirements.

name: Decision Documentation

name: Audit Inputs

name: Preparation and Architecture

name: Code Security and Analysis

name: Automated Risk Management
desc: Integrates machine learning models to enhance vulnerability prioritization and security posture validation.

name: Supplier Performance Monitoring
desc: Implements regular evaluations and compliance tracking for all supplier engagements.

name: User Authentication

name: Firewall Configuration

name: Software Updates and Patch Management

name: User Authentication and Authorization
desc: Ensures strong authentication measures such as MFA and RBAC for all network access.

name: Firewalls and Intrusion Detection Systems
desc: Protects network perimeters from unauthorized access and cyber threats.

name: Executive Oversight
desc: Senior leadership responsible for defining and enforcing cloud security policies.

name: Cloud Security Architecture
desc: Ensures that cloud resources follow secure deployment and segmentation guidelines.

name: Continuous Monitoring
desc: Implements real-time detection of cloud security threats and anomalies.

name: Identity and Access Management (IAM)
desc: Restricts access based on role, responsibility, and security principles.

name: Regulatory Compliance
desc: Ensures cloud deployments align with industry regulations and security frameworks.

name: Encryption Standards

name: Executive Oversight
desc: Senior personnel responsible for strategic direction and overall governance.

name: Documentation and Knowledge Base
